name: SOT3 Truth Flow Runtime Owner
claimBoundary: ACCEPTED_REVIEW_EVIDENCE only. DistributionEngine exists as bounded local-ready package runtime that creates and transitions DistributionPackage records strictly post-Kernel, re-resolving bound Kernel authority references at each action time. This entry does not claim the Flow is globally activated, always invoked by any CVF Web or production request path, a provider boundary, publicly exported, or production-ready. Activation into a real product path is governed separately by the SOT3 activation architecture decision and its A1-A5 proof ladder, not by this catalog record.
boundaryCaveat: Does not claim universal activation, provider/live behavior, public export, or production readiness. Local-ready package existence only; wiring into any product request path remains governed by the separate SOT3 activation decision and roadmap.
